---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for NoteFlow
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem Statement
Is this feature related to a problem? Please describe.
Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Describe how this feature would be used. Who would benefit from it?

## Mockups / Screenshots
If applicable, add mockups or screenshots to help illustrate the feature.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Priority
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Critical
